brief: US businesses sue over tariffs, Paramount delays merger, wildfires rage in France and Spain, and measles cases hit a record high.
news_summary: Two US small businesses sue Trump administration over new tariffs; Paramount agrees to delay Warner Bros. merger. Wildfires force tens of thousands to flee in France and Spain; measles cases reach a record high in the US.
papers_summary: Studies explore usability of conversational AI, geographic-legislative associations, wearable AI for fiction writing, and AR accessibility for deaf students.

zh.brief: 今日新闻聚焦美国以强迫劳动为由对60个贸易伙伴加征关税、美中AI技术争端升级、以及欧洲野火与麻疹疫情。论文主要涉及人机交互与AI辅助工具的设计研究。
zh.news_summary: 美国宣布对60个贸易伙伴征收10%-12.5%关税，理由是强迫劳动问题，涵盖中国、台湾等；白宫指控中国AI公司‘月之暗面’窃取Anthropic技术。此外，法国和西班牙野火迫使超10万人撤离，美国麻疹病例创30年新高。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇论文探讨AI在对话系统、创意写作、增强现实及临床工作流中的应用，强调可解释性与用户体验；另有一篇研究评估可视化工具对逻辑编程学习的效果。

todays_image.caption: The aster flower's name means "star," and the merger delay buys time for the studio stars to align.
todays_image.title: Chaetopappa asteroides (Nutt.) DC.
